pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 11 to 17 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 2.6.2, which is required for native Java 17 support.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Explicitly set the MVC path matching strategy to ANT_PATH_MATCHER to maintain compatibility with older Spring MVC path matching behavior, often required when migrating from Spring Boot 2.x to 3.x or using certain libraries like Springfox.
